hero.heading: About Peptide Pure™
hero.subtitle: A dual-entity structure providing clinicians with verified peptide sourcing and an organized research framework.

structure.heading: Clinical-Grade Sourcing Within a Research Framework
structure.description: Peptide-based medicine requires more than compound access — it requires documentation, standardized protocols, and a defensible clinical framework. Peptide Pure™ operates through a dual-entity model that separates research oversight from sourcing and logistics.

researchEntity.title: Research Entity — 501(c)(3)
researchEntity.description: The nonprofit research entity oversees structured, observational clinical studies focused on regenerative and peptide-based protocols.
items: Structured observational clinical studies under 45 CFR 46
Standardized data collection, follow-up, and outcome tracking
Supports evidence generation for peptide-based interventions

peptidePure.title: Peptide Pure — LLC
peptidePure.description: The operational entity responsible for sourcing, quality verification, and distribution of research-grade peptides to enrolled clinics.
items: Peptides manufactured under ISO 9001 and cGMP-compliant systems
Multi-lab testing, Certificates of Analysis, and full traceability
Secure logistics, fulfillment, and inventory management
Standardized clinic onboarding and protocol support

clinicalContext.heading: Clinical Context
clinicalContext.intro: Clinicians working with peptides currently face limited options:
problems: Unverified sourcing with inconsistent quality documentation
Lack of a structured research framework for clinical use
clinicalContext.solution: This dual-entity model addresses both gaps.
clinicalContext.conclusion: The research entity provides the framework and oversight. Peptide Pure™ handles sourcing, verification, and logistics — giving clinicians a compliant pathway for peptide-based protocols.

items.title: Precision
items.desc: Accurate milligram strengths, verified compounds, and protocol-specific formulations.

items.title: Integrity
items.desc: Full documentation, batch traceability, and transparent sourcing at every step.

items.title: Compliance
items.desc: Aligned with 45 CFR 46, FDA guidance, and applicable state medical practice standards.

items.title: Clinician-Led
items.desc: MD-owned and operated — structured by clinicians for use in clinical settings.

cta.heading: Clinician Enrollment
cta.subtitle: Verified clinicians can access the full catalog, protocol documentation, and clinical study enrollment.
